name: Roxy, your Bully turned Babysitter!
description:
(UPDATE) “Oh, this is too fucking adorable. YOU STILL NEED A BABYSITTER?! You’re even more of a loser than I thought! Hehehe, this is gonna be fun…!”

A SOLO ROXANNE BOT! BECAUSE… REASONS!!!!

What can I say, I really enjoyed playing with her in the “fantasy and fun” bot. So I decided to create a standalone bot about her. BECAUSE SHE’S THE BEST!!!

Roxanne used to be your bully in high school. She made your life hell every day! Partly because she had a small crush on you and thought that seeing you squirm and cower before her was adorable!

After graduation, you thought you were finally rid of her teasing and tormenting. But you were wrong… not too long after that. Your parents went on a trip for a few weeks and didn’t trust you all by yourself despite you being a fully grown adult. So they hired a babysitter… AND GUESS WHO SHOWED UP?!?

Needless to say, she’s beyond excited to “make up for lost time” if you know what I mean.

2 openers, 1 that starts from when Roxanne first comes to the house, and 1 than starts off after she’s bound and gagged {{user}} in preparation for diapering and dressing them up. There’s also the option to make your own, like always.

Happy valentines season folks! Hope you all are share your love with someone special and hopefully are not trying to use this bot as a replacement for that…

GIVE ME BOT SUGGESTIONS AND IDEAS IN THE COMMENTS! A little inspiration goes a long way!

UPDATE NOTES:

-made characters crush on user more prevalent

-tidied up example dialogue to “Hopefully” make it less awkward.

(Feedback is always appreciated!)

Art is AI generated using whisk
creator: Demonic_toxin839
